subcodes.first_line: O Comforter of the friends! His honor the Qá'im-Maqám hath for some time been dwelling in the land of Joseph of Canaan in the utmost joy and delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مونس یاران جناب قائممقام چندی است در کشور یوسف کنعان در نهایت روح و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
